failure_reason: Moved native BML file scanning to a generic source_scan_file(path, lexicon) boundary across Go/Rust/TypeScript. Initial Go build attempts exposed sandbox cache/output placement, fixed by using /private/tmp. The generic scanner proof returns 511 and proves alternate Form lexicons change token classes; file forward/backward and char escape proofs remain green at 131071 and 2147483647. The native audit now forbids bml_scan_file and hard-coded BML scanner tables while requiring source_scan_file.
